description_long: This arcade game cabinet features a tall, upright rectangular structure with a glossy black front and yellow side trims. The front panel includes a large display screen, a control panel with buttons and a joystick, and a coin slot below, all set against a backdrop of vibrant artwork. The side panels are adorned with detailed graphics depicting action scenes, including characters and vehicles, in a style reminiscent of urban street culture. The control panel is slightly angled for ergonomic access and features a classic arcade button and joystick layout. The top section houses a marquee area, though the artwork is minimal or absent. The cabinet is constructed primarily from wood and plastic, with metal components for internal support and controls.
description: A tall, glossy black arcade game cabinet with yellow side trims, vibrant side panel artwork, and a classic control panel with joystick and buttons.
description_view_0: Front view shows a sleek, glossy black panel with yellow trims and minimal visible features.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights detailed action-themed artwork and the protruding control panel with joystick and buttons.
description_view_2: Front-interactive view displays the screen, control panel, coin slot, and lower panel artwork featuring a character.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, with matching action-themed graphics and the control panel profile.
attribute_screen_type: CRT, flat with a visible bezel, medium size typical of classic arcade cabinets
attribute_control_panel_layout: Single-player layout with one joystick and several round buttons, arranged in a classic arcade configuration with a dark color scheme and yellow button accents
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Side panels feature vibrant, action-themed artwork with characters, vehicles, and urban motifs in shades of orange, green, and white
